name.description: Key name to set translations for

namespace.description: The namespace of the key. (When empty or null default namespace will be used)

uploadedImageId.description: Ids of screenshot uploaded with /v2/image-upload endpoint

resolution.description:
Determines, how conflict is resolved.
      - KEEP: Translation is not changed
      - OVERRIDE: Translation is overridden
      - NEW: New translation is created
      - FORCE_OVERRIDE: Translation is updated, created or kept.

translations.description: Object mapping language tag to translation
